steps.title: Use the two values as a table
steps.content: Since $f$ is linear, the two values determine the whole function. The points are $(0,9)$ and $(1,14)$.

steps.title: Find the slope and intercept
steps.content: The slope is $$\frac{14-9}{1-0}=5.$$ Since $f(0)=9$, the y-intercept is $9$, so $$f(x)=5x+9.$$

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: Choice D — $f \left(x\right)=5x+9$, $f(x)=5x+9$, has slope $5$ and gives $f(0)=9$ and $f(1)=14$. That matches Choice D — $f \left(x\right)=5x+9$.
